title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rapido - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
